items.promptRawJa: Разрешено управление неисправным автомобилем после капитального ремонта.
items.promptGlossEn: Is it allowed to drive a faulty car after a major repair?
items.reviewerNotes: No reliable existing qid and no visible answer key. Russian wording says driving a faulty vehicle after major repair is allowed, which is internally ambiguous/corrupted, so do not create or approve without human confirmation.
